nodes.name: 红耳火尾雀
nodes.summary: 红耳火尾雀（学名：Stagonopleura oculata）是梅花雀科的一种，为澳大利亚的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。 红耳火尾雀的平均体重约为13.5克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、亚热带或热带的（低地）湿润疏灌丛和湿地。 参考文献 Stagonopleura oculata. BirdLife.org. [2011-06-27].
nodes.shortSummary: 红耳火尾雀（学名：Stagonopleura oculata）是梅花雀科的一种，为澳大利亚的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。 红耳火尾雀的平均体重约为13.5克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、亚热带或热带的（低地）湿润疏灌丛和湿地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Stagonopleura
nodes.summary: Stagonopleura（Stagonopleura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如斑胁火尾雀、红耳火尾雀、艳火尾雀。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It occurs in dense wetland vegetation of coastal to sub-coastal regions in Southwest Australia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: A report on the species for the British journal Ibis by Tom Carter in 1921 noted the occurrence of the species at swamps, common at those dominated by paperbark (Melaleuca) near Albany (1913) and located nests at a wetland near Cape Leeuwin (1916); records are also given for sites around Lake Muir (1913) and at Warren River (March, 1919) in dense scrub below karri forest. Carter had earlier given his observations between Albany and Cape Naturaliste, and noted it was common at springs on limestone hills near Margaret River, Western Australia; he considered a specimen he shot in a karri tree as outside its usual habitat of the dense understorey
